home.hero_subtitle: A powerful platform for creating, testing, and running algorithmic trading bots. Start with Binance — connect more exchanges as you grow.
home.features_subtitle: Everything you need for algorithmic trading
home.feature_1_desc: Grid trading, DCA, and custom strategies — pick what fits your style.
home.feature_2_desc: Binance, Bybit, OKX — connect any exchange and manage everything from one place.
home.feature_3_desc: API keys encrypted on the server. Short-lived tokens. Full audit trail.
home.feature_4_desc: Complete Swagger documentation with all endpoints, schemas, and examples.
home.cta_subtitle: Create your first trading bot right now.

bots.title: My bots
bots.subtitle: Manage your trading bots
bots.no_bots: You don't have any bots yet.
bots.create_engine_warning: Bot was saved, but the exchange returned an error: {error}
bots.no_api_keys: Add an exchange API key before creating a bot.
bots.error_grid_orders: Grid orders count must be between 1 and 500
bots.confirm_close: Close bot {symbol}? Positions will be closed on the exchange.
bots.confirm_redeploy: Redeploy grid for {symbol}? Orders will be cancelled and the grid will be placed again.
bots.bulk_confirm_stop_all_message: Orders will be cancelled on the exchange for every active bot. Bots will move to stopped status.
bots.bulk_confirm_close_all_message: Every bot that is not closed will have orders cancelled and positions closed on the exchange.
bots.bulk_confirm_remove_all_message: All bots will be hidden from the list. Active bots will attempt to cancel orders first.

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.subtitle: Connect and manage exchanges
exchanges.binance_desc: Largest crypto exchange by volume. Futures and spot trading, high liquidity.
exchanges.bybit_desc: Derivatives exchange focused on futures and perpetual contracts. Low fees.
exchanges.okx_desc: Multi-functional exchange with spot, futures, and options. API support.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile and account security
settings.email_readonly_hint: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if you need to update it.
settings.telegram_section_desc: Link your account to the bot and configure bot notification types.
settings.telegram_link_hint: Get a one-time code and send it to the bot in Telegram to link your account.
settings.telegram_prefs_disabled_hint: Link Telegram first to configure notifications.
settings.telegram_test_hint: Send a test message to your linked chat.
settings.password_hint: To change your password, we'll send a reset link to your email.
